name: Data Agent Creation and Configuration
description: Create a Data Agent, connect to a lakehouse, configure tables, add few-shots, test, and publish.
prerequisites: Lakehouse with populated tables (tables must be visible via SQL endpoint)

steps.description: Connect agent to lakehouse. Schema discovery starts asynchronously.
Select all discovered tables. If 0 tables selected, schema discovery is still in progress — wait and retry.
Set agent instructions for query generation guidance.

steps.command: fabio data-agent add-fewshot --workspace $WS_ID --id $AGENT_ID --datasource $LH_ID --question "Top 5 customers by revenue?" --sql "SELECT TOP 5 ..."
steps.description: Add few-shot example to improve query generation.

steps.command: fabio data-agent query --workspace $WS_ID --id $AGENT_ID --prompt "How many orders last month?"

schema_discovery.behavior: After add-datasource, Fabric asynchronously discovers the lakehouse SQL endpoint schema (tables, columns). This typically takes 1-5 minutes for new lakehouses.
schema_discovery.detection: Use 'fabio data-agent list-elements --workspace $WS --id $AGENT --datasource $LH' — if empty, discovery is still in progress.
schema_discovery.retry_pattern: Wait 60s between retries, up to 5 attempts. If tables never appear after 5 min, proceed with --all-tables anyway — it will include all tables once published.
schema_discovery.acceleration: Querying the lakehouse SQL endpoint directly (fabio lakehouse query --sql "SELECT 1") can sometimes accelerate schema indexing.

tips: Max 5 datasources per agent, 100 fewshots per datasource.
Schema discovery is async — tables may not appear immediately after add-datasource. Wait 1-2 min and retry.
Use --all-tables instead of listing individual table names to avoid case-sensitivity issues.
Use --stage production on query to test published version.
Use fabio data-agent upload-fewshots --file examples.csv for bulk loading.
Use fabio data-agent describe-element to add column descriptions.
The --datasource flag accepts either the datasource name or the artifact ID.
